title: Mordomo OS
source_of_truth: Brain hub is a local/documental snapshot and routing index.
Use the linked ARTIFACT_INDEX/CURRENT_STATE/DECISIONS_AND_GUARDRAILS files for local evidence.
For current operational/business state, consult the named live source or runtime before acting.
guardrails: Brain is a snapshot/index; live source wins for current state.
No external writes, runtime changes, secrets, customer messages, purchases, campaigns or production changes without scoped approval.
Receipts/reports are evidence, not current operational approval.
